ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image */,
  "image_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the breed */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Temperament of the breed */,
  "grooming_needs" TEXT /* Grooming needs of the breed */,
  "breed_group" TEXT /* Group the breed belongs to */,
  "breed_size" TEXT /* Size of the breed */,
  "breed_energy_level" TEXT /* Energy level of the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being predicted */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted breed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating assigned to the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  "confidence_threshold" REAL /* Minimum confidence level required for a prediction to be considered accurate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being interacted with */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating assigned to the image */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "interaction_content" TEXT /* Content of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: ID of the user who uploaded the image
Tags or keywords associated with the image
ID of the image being predicted
Method used to make the prediction
Minimum confidence level required for a prediction to be considered accurate
ID of the user who interacted with the image
ID of the image being interacted with
